cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top 5 numbers are chosen from the highest scoring candidates in the shortlist, aligning well with the most frequent digits per position from historical data. The top 50 expands on these strong candidates while maintaining diversity and adherence to digit frequency patterns observed in recent draws.
